subcodes.first_line: O my God and Helper of them that are sincere and steadfast in Thy Covenant and assured in Thy Promise, assist these Thy servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و موید المخلصین و الثابتین علی عهدک و المطمئنین بوعدک وفق عبیدک هولاء
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
